name: Update Employee Contact Details
description:
As an ESS user (employee)
  I want to edit my contact information in the HRMS application
  So that my contact details remain current and accurate

steps.name: the employee is logged into the HRMS application using valid ESS user credentials
the employee navigates to the "My Info" and "Contact Details" section
the employee should see editable fields for contact information:
the employee is logged into the HRMS application using valid ESS user credentials
the employee navigates to the "My Info" and "Contact Details" section
the employee updates the following contact details:
clicks on the "Save" button
a success message should be displayed

steps.name: the system should display an phone number validation error
the employee is logged into the HRMS application using valid ESS user credentials
the employee navigates to the "My Info" and "Contact Details" section
the employee enters an invalid email format in "Work Email" or "Other Email"
clicks on the "Save" button
the system should display an email format validation error

steps.name: the employee is logged into the HRMS application using valid ESS user credentials
the employee navigates to the "My Info" and "Contact Details" section
the employee updates the following contact details:
clicks on the "Save" button
logs out of the application
logs back in
navigates to the "Contact Details" section
the previously updated contact details should be displayed
